## Problem

What real workflow problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed idea

Describe the feature or workflow you want.

## Why it matters

Explain why this would be useful in real usage.

## Related module

If relevant, mention the module this request is related to.

## Extra context

Any examples, references, or similar workflows are welcome.
